name: Western Union
description_short: Las Vegas Western Union at 1760 E Charleston Blvd, NV offers money transfer and check-cashing services.
description_long:
Located at 1760 E Charleston Blvd in Las Vegas, NV, this Western Union location operates daily from 8 AM to 8 PM, providing convenient access for money transfer and check-cashing services. Situated as a standalone facility, this Las Vegas branch serves the community with extended hours that accommodate both weekday and weekend customers.

This Western Union location at 1760 E Charleston Blvd offers domestic and international money transfers, bill payment services, and check cashing for Las Vegas, NV residents. To discuss services, rates, or specific transfer needs, customers can call (702) 366-1550 during business hours for assistance.

For Las Vegas residents using this Western Union location, bring a valid government-issued ID and ensure you have any required documentation for your transaction. This location provides reliable money transfer options for individuals sending funds domestically or internationally.
address: 1760 E Charleston Blvd, Las Vegas, NV 89104

company_info.headquarters: 1760 E Charleston Blvd, Las Vegas, NV 89104

pros: Extensive agent network with 150+ U.S. locations in convenient retail partnerships (Walmart, Safeway, City Market, Kroger, Circle K)
24/7 online money transfer initiation available on WU.com, enabling around-the-clock service initiation
Multilingual support in 6 languages (English, Spanish, Haitian Creole, Chinese, French, Vietnamese) serving diverse populations
Multiple service options including money transfers, bill payment, mobile top-up, money orders, and prepaid card services
Real-time transfer tracking available to customers
Same-day or next-day cash pickup availability at most agent locations
Western Union Rewards program offering incentives for repeat usage and referrals
cons: Service availability dependent on agent location hours (most locations close by 8-11 PM, limiting late-night access)
Higher fees and exchange rates compared to digital-only money transfer competitors
Geolocation feature requires browser permissions to find nearby locations, creating extra friction
Limited service offerings at some locations (e.g., Circle K #0682 restricted to money orders only)
Temporary service outages (Orange wallet payment method was unavailable at time of data collection)
best_for: Immigrants and international customers sending remittances to family abroad requiring same-day cash delivery
Unbanked and underbanked populations in rural areas without access to traditional banking services
Customers who prefer cash transactions and need reliable physical locations for money pickup
Non-English speakers requiring multilingual support and familiar brand presence
diagnosis: Western Union is best for customers who prioritize same-day cash access and convenience of physical retail locations over lowest price, particularly immigrants sending international remittances and unbanked populations in underserved areas. The main caveat is that fees are significantly higher than digital alternatives, and service quality depends on individual agent location hours and operational status.
services: In-store cash payment at agent locations
meta_description: Western Union at 1760 E Charleston Blvd, Las Vegas, NV. Money transfers and check cashing open 8 AM–8 PM daily.
